author: zhaowei123-wo
title: Single-Module Bloat in concerns.py
notes: concerns.py is 635 lines (confirmed) but is a cohesive module with a single responsibility: generating concerns from mechanical signals. All 20+ functions serve the concern generation pipeline. The 'split by concern type' suggestion would scatter tightly-coupled pipeline logic across files for no functional benefit. 635 lines with clear internal structure is not bloat. This is a generic 'file too long' opinion, not a concrete engineering problem.
